raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works (CAMEL, Generative Agents, ReAct, HuggingGPT, MetaGPT, AutoGen, ChatDev) and identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta by highlighting the unique contribution of StructAgents.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (MetaGPT, AutoGen, ChatDev), and corrects the chronological order of ReAct and HuggingGPT.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, such as verifying if MetaGPT/AutoGen/ChatDev enforce schemas on every inter-agent message and confirming citation years.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or deviation from the requested improvements.",
    "RX.4": "The output identifies no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and avoids regressions by carefully rephrasing claims to be more precise and defensible.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works (CAMEL, Generative Agents, ReAct, HuggingGPT, MetaGPT, AutoGen, ChatDev) and identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta by highlighting the unique contribution of StructAgents.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (MetaGPT, AutoGen, ChatDev), and corrects the chronological order of ReAct and HuggingGPT.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, such as verifying if MetaGPT/AutoGen/ChatDev enforce schemas on every inter-agent message and confirming citation years.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or deviation from the requested improvements.
rationale.RX.4: The output identifies no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and avoids regressions by carefully rephrasing claims to be more precise and defensible.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions made.
